item.title: Adapt your Shopping campaigns to modern Search with AI Max.
item.description: Built for the next generation of Search, AI Max for Shopping campaigns helps retailers reach shoppers the moment discovery begins.

og.title: Adapt your Shopping campaigns to modern Search with AI Max.

item.title: Meet travelers in the moments that matter with Search Campaigns for Travel.
item.description: Upgrade to AI Max to simplify your workflow and access our most advanced tools.

og.title: Meet travelers in the moments that matter with Search Campaigns for Travel.

item.title: AI Max Turns 1 with new ways to steer performance and expansion to more advertisers
item.media:description: "The Road to Google Marketing Live" surrounded by various shopping items
item.description: As AI Max turns 1, we’re helping you capture even more opportunities in the expanding Search universe.

og.title: AI Max Turns 1 with new ways to steer performance and expansion to more advertisers
og.description: As AI Max turns 1, we’re helping you capture even more opportunities in the expanding Search universe.

author.name: Brandon Ervin
author.title: Director of Product Management, Google Ads

item.title: We’re donating Agent Payments Protocol to the FIDO Alliance to support the future of secure, agentic payments.
item.description: Google donates the Agent Payments Protocol (AP2) to the FIDO Alliance to help secure the evolution of AI-driven commerce.

og.title: We’re donating Agent Payments Protocol to the FIDO Alliance to support the future of secure, agentic payments.

item.title: Albertsons Media Collective brings retail signals to YouTube with Google’s Commerce Media Suite.
item.description: Supercharge performance across the shopper journey by connecting Albertsons data with Google’s AI and scale.

og.title: Albertsons Media Collective brings retail signals to YouTube with Google’s Commerce Media Suite.

item.title: There's a new playbook for partnering with creators on marketing campaigns.
item.description: How Google is building tools to make creator partnerships accessible and effective.

og.title: There's a new playbook for partnering with creators on marketing campaigns.

item.title: 3 easy ways to shop for spring with Google
item.media:description: Illustration of two phone screens showing a user using Google's try on technology on a person wearing a bright yellow top and white cropped pants, and Circle to Search on a person wearing a dark yellow top and white pants
item.description: Here are three Google Search and Shopping tools that can help you shop for spring fashion.

og.title: 3 easy ways to shop for spring with Google
og.description: Here are three Google Search and Shopping tools that can help you shop for spring fashion.

item.title: Convert faster on YouTube with April’s Demand Gen Drop.
item.description: Learn more about our latest Demand Gen Drop and ways to maximize campaign performance in Demand Gen campaigns.

og.title: Convert faster on YouTube with April’s Demand Gen Drop.

item.title: 3 new ways Ads Advisor is making Google Ads safer and faster
item.media:description: The Road to Google Marketing Live graphic. May 20, 2026, 9am PT. White background with colorful bottom gradient.
item.description: Three new agentic safety and policy features integrated into Ads Advisor will help protect and streamline your Google Ads account.

og.title: 3 new ways Ads Advisor is making Google Ads safer and faster
og.description: Three new agentic safety and policy features integrated into Ads Advisor will help protect and streamline your Google Ads account.

item.title: 7 ways to travel smarter this summer, with help from Google
item.media:description: Illustration showing a person with a Pixel phone in a beach town farmers' market by the water
item.description: The latest tools from Google can help you plan trips, find a great deal and explore your next destination.

og.title: 7 ways to travel smarter this summer, with help from Google
og.description: The latest tools from Google can help you plan trips, find a great deal and explore your next destination.

item.title: Gemini is stopping harmful ads before people ever see them
item.description: Gemini-powered tools vastly improved our ability to stop deceptive ads, and we’re continuing to evolve to stay ahead of bad actors.

og.title: Gemini is stopping harmful ads before people ever see them
og.description: Gemini-powered tools vastly improved our ability to stop deceptive ads, and we’re continuing to evolve to stay ahead of bad actors.

item.title: We’re upgrading Dynamic Search Ads to AI Max
item.media:description: A conceptual graphic illustrating the transition from Google Ads legacy features to AI Max.
item.description: AI Max is moving out of beta, with improved performance quality across targeting and creative capabilities along with more enhanced controls.

og.title: We’re upgrading Dynamic Search Ads to AI Max
og.description: AI Max is moving out of beta, with improved performance quality across targeting and creative capabilities along with more enhanced controls.

author.name: Brandon Ervin
author.title: Director of Product Management, Google Ads

item.title: AI is changing retail. Here’s how businesses can keep up.

item.title: Ads Decoded episode 5 navigates the challenges and impact of effective lead gen advertising.

item.title: Google’s Commerce Media Suite: Where retailer insights meet the power of YouTube
item.media:description: A video of Display & Video 360, YouTube, and Kroger Precision Marketing logos moving alongside icons representing audiences and measurement.

item.title: We’re launching the Top Sports Podcasts on YouTube for brands to align with sports fans.
item.description: YouTube is where all sports come to life — because no sporting event or game would be complete without the commentary, breakdowns and analysis surrounding it. In 2025 al…

og.title: We’re launching the Top Sports Podcasts on YouTube for brands to align with sports fans.

item.title: AI shopping gets simpler with Universal Commerce Protocol updates
item.media:description: Colorful illustration of a shopping bag, magnifying glass and text boxes surrounded by sparkles and wavy lines
item.description: Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP) releases new capabilities, and Google shares a new onboarding experience to simplify UCP integration.

og.title: AI shopping gets simpler with Universal Commerce Protocol updates
og.description: Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP) releases new capabilities, and Google shares a new onboarding experience to simplify UCP integration.

item.title: A more personal digital health experience for people in Europe
item.media:description: Illustration of various medical images including a stethoscope and heart on a blue background, surrounded by differently colored lines
item.description: Google and DocMorris have announced a partnership to create a more intuitive and supportive digital health experience.

og.description: Google and DocMorris have announced a partnership to create a more intuitive and supportive digital health experience.
